post.subject: Glimmer
post.body: I got 3 tickets for the great JJ72 for myself and two wonderful people... only to find out they cant go. They are going to try hard to get going though cos i dont wanna go by myself and i know very few people who are really that interested in going. Though if all fails - I may have 2 spare tickets for anyone who would like to go!

comments.body: fuck me? well I never mr denton. I am going to JJ72.
comments.author: hynde
